text: Just signed a MASSIVE trade deal with China. Tariffs coming DOWN, markets going UP! This is great for American workers and businesses. The economy is BOOMING!
China has been ripping us off for YEARS. Effective immediately, I am imposing 50% tariffs on ALL Chinese goods. They need to learn to play fair!
Happy Birthday to our wonderful First Lady, Melania! She is doing an incredible job. We love you!
Big news for the energy sector! We are opening up MILLIONS of acres for oil and gas drilling. Energy independence is BACK. Gas prices will come down FAST!
The Federal Reserve needs to CUT RATES NOW. They are destroying our economy with these ridiculous interest rates. Other countries are laughing at us!
